description: Paradigm-contrast control for B (pre-reg §3, addendum item K): mirrors Arm B's loop -- structural dry-run gate ON, safety skill ON, same skills -- EXCEPT the paradigm is imperative PySpark instead of Spark Declarative Pipelines. allowed_commands are the IMPERATIVE equivalents (the commands are paradigm-bound: B drives the SDP CLI `spark-pipelines`, the imperative executor drives `python`/`spark-submit` on the agent's program, with `python --analyze-only` for the gate -- identical to the imperative arms A/B2). B-vs-A2 holds the gate and skill constant, so any B-vs-A2 difference is attributable to the declarative-vs-imperative paradigm, not to the gate/skill confound that B-vs-A carries.
